channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Religious persecution drives anti-U.S. policies in Cuba and Nicaragua
item.description: The Trump administration should press Havana and Managua to strengthen religious freedom.

item.title: CBS and the Colbert Apocalypse
item.description: How Spielberg, Byrne, Springsteen, and Obama supporters yielded to woke media.

item.title: Speech restrictions are more severe than previously believed
item.description: The rise in U.K. speech offenses is driven more by new laws than by an increase in harmful behavior.

item.title: Max Eastman, literary gangster
item.description: The editor showed how ideology can stifle creativity.
